name: Whole Wheat Hamburger and Hot Dog Buns
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp - more water (for whole wheat/dak add)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in bread pan; select Dough setting and press Start.
2. When the dough has risen sufficiently, the machine will beep.
3. Turn off the bread machine, remove the bread pan, and turn out the dough onto a floured countertop or cutting board.
4. Gently roll and shape the dough into a 12-inch rope.
5. Using a sharp knife, divide the dough into 8 pieces for hamburger buns or 12 pieces for hot dog buns.
6. Grease a baking sheet.
7. Roll each piece of dough into a ball and flatten for hamburger buns or shape into 6-inch rolls for hot dog buns.
8. Place the shaped buns on the prepared baking sheet.
9. Cover and let rise in a warm oven (10-15 minutes) until almost doubled.
- To warm the oven slightly, turn it on Warm setting for 2 minutes, then turn it off and place the covered dough in the oven to rise. Remove the sheet from the oven to preheat.
10. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
11. Bake for 12-15 minutes until golden brown. Remove from the oven and cool on racks.
12. To use, split the buns in half horizontally. These will keep in a plastic bag in the freezer for 3 to 4 weeks.
